message:
fix(search): use exact per-pane accepted counts instead of proportional estimates

Add IngestOutcome with accepted_docs_by_pane HashMap tracking exact
per-pane counts during ingestion. Replace proportional distribution
(dividing accepted total by submitted total) which was inaccurate
when duplicates were unevenly distributed across panes. Add 2 tests
verifying correctness with uneven duplicate distribution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
